exploration_notes: Found all 5 requested consumer group partition assignment strategy classes in the kafka clients module, plus the intermediate AbstractStickyAssignor base class. The inheritance hierarchy is: AbstractPartitionAssignor (base, implements ConsumerPartitionAssignor) -> RangeAssignor, RoundRobinAssignor, and AbstractStickyAssignor -> StickyAssignor, CooperativeStickyAssignor. There is also a server-side RangeAssignor in group-coordinator/ that implements a different interface (ConsumerGroupPartitionAs
